query: /* select#1 */ select `testdb`.`orders`.`id` AS `id`,`testdb`.`orders`.`user_id` AS `user_id`,`testdb`.`orders`.`total` AS `total`,lag(`testdb`.`orders`.`total`) OVER (PARTITION BY `testdb`.`orders`.`user_id` ORDER BY `testdb`.`orders`.`created_at` )  AS `prev_total` from `testdb`.`orders` where (`testdb`.`orders`.`user_id` between 1 and 50)

inputs.operation: Index range scan on orders using idx_user over (1 <= user_id <= 50), with index condition: (orders.user_id between 1 and 50)

functions: lag(orders.total) OVER (PARTITION BY orders.user_id ORDER BY orders.created_at )
operation: Window aggregate with buffering: lag(orders.total) OVER (PARTITION BY orders.user_id ORDER BY orders.created_at )
